notes: Collaboration apps are treated as work by default, but users can override them as distracting or ignored.
Browsers do not decide focus by themselves; window title/site rules have higher priority.
AI assistants, research databases, academic writing and translation tools that are usually used intentionally.
Browser-hosted collaboration surfaces that usually represent active work communication.
Career and recruiting workflows are classified as intentional work; social feeds remain covered by social rules.
Only obvious casual/sports/viral consumption sites are included here; general news is intentionally sparse to reduce false positives.
Inspired by public blacklist categories for gambling and betting; intentionally keeps to explicit brands/terms.
